summary: Canary rollout stuck at 5 percent traffic, will not ramp
description: Following the new canary process from HEL-021, a rollout this morning sat at 5 percent canary weight for over an hour with no automatic progression and metrics that looked healthy the whole time.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: Ramp stages in the runbook are manual steps today, not automated. The engineer running the rollout stepped away after setting the initial weight and nothing advanced it. Not a bug in src/serving/router.ts, more a process gap.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: we should probably automate the stage advancement given how new this process is, easy to forget a manual step

comments.author: Sam Whitfield
comments.body: +1, happened to me on staging too last week
